name: Marcy Stech, EMILY's List
subject: Before tonight's debate
disclaimer_text: Paid for by EMILY's List [www
body:
| [ ](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c08cc/24c69fd9/14a78f3e/18eb9e9e/3478485987/VEsH/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/donate-to-emily?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=1+-+%0D%0A++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++&utm_campaign=WPEFEV07N_digital_email_20161004_VP_n-all&source=WPEFEV07N_digital_email_20161004_VP_n-all")
---

| | Hi there,

Tonight Tim Kaine and Mike Pence face off in the first and only vice presidential debate.

Don't let his aw-shucks demeanor fool you: Indiana Governor Mike Pence is as extreme of a Republican as you can get. He's supported banning abortions, defunding Planned Parenthood, and legalizing discrimination against the LGBT community during his time as governor.

Being second in command wouldn't do much to rein in Pence's extreme agenda either. When Trump was picking his VP, his son told one of the potential picks that Trump's vice president would "be in charge of domestic and foreign policy" -- a pretty big responsibility.

**[A Trump-Pence White House is simply not an option. Donate $3 now to help defeat them and Republicans like them.](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c08cc/24c69fd9/14a78f3e/18eb9e98/3478485987/VEsF/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/20161004_email_VP?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=3+-+A+TrumpPence+White+House+is+simply+not+a&utm_campaign=WPEFEV07N_digital_email_20161004_VP_n-all&source=WPEFEV07N_digital_email_20161004_VP_n-all")**

Can you imagine if Pence had control over domestic issues?

The guy rose to national prominence as the governor who signed a bigoted bill that legalized discrimination against LGBT people. Estimates say that Indianapolis alone lost $60 million from the blowback, with companies and organizations from Apple to Eli Lilly to the NBA cutting back or pulling out of the state.

Pence widely supports banning abortion -- including a bill many Indiana Republicans called too extreme. Earlier this year, he signed a bill into law that forces mothers to hold funerals for their fetuses after having an abortion or miscarrying. Already, there are only four counties out of the 92 in Indiana that even have an abortion provider.

Imagine that man having at least four years on the national stage -- then make sure he never gets it.

**If we want LGBT equality and quality reproductive health care access, we can't let Trump and Pence near the White House. Donate $3 to help stop Trump, Pence, and many of the Republicans who agree with their agenda:**

**[https://secure.emilyslist.org/Vice-Presidential-Debate](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c08cc/24c69fd9/14a78f3e/18eb9e99/3478485987/VEsC/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/20161004_email_VP?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=4+-+httpssecureemilyslistorgVicePresidential&utm_campaign=WPEFEV07N_digital_email_20161004_VP_n-all&source=WPEFEV07N_digital_email_20161004_VP_n-all")**

Thanks,

Marcy Stech
Vice President of Communications, EMILY's List

name: Shannon, OurRevolution.com
subject: Thank you
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY OUR REVOLUTION
body:
#
Sisters and Brothers,
Together, we were able to accomplish something incredible. Thousands of our supporters made nearly 100,000 contributions last week split between almost fifty candidates endorsed by Our Revolution.
What we did in the last week is very real, very significant support for our candidates. For some candidates you funded practically their entire campaigns. For others you gave them critical support -- both financial and personal -- before one of the biggest deadlines of their campaigns.
This is the power of our political revolution. We have the power to change our country so that it works for everyone, not just the billionaire class; the power to elect progressives who will fight for all of us and pass ballot initiatives that will empower people to get better health care and get big money out of politics.
I know that we have asked a lot of you, and you stepped up beyond what anyone thought possible. With just five weeks until election day, our job is to continue to do all we can to fight and win elections that will continue our political revolution.
Thank you for all you do.
In solidarity,
Shannon Jackson
Executive Director, Our Revolution

name: Trump Team Virginia
subject: A Great Debate! Are you watching this debate?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Donald J
body:
Peter --

What a fantastic debate performance we are seeing from Governor Pence. He is showing us exactly why Donald Trump trusts him to be his running mate.

Mr. Trump and Gov. Pence need your help to MAKE AMERICA GREAT AGAIN!
[ Join us this weekend and help Donald Trump win the White House!](https://donaldtrump.nationbuilder.com/r?u=https%3A%2F%2Furldefense.proofpoint.com%2Fv2%2Furl%3Fu%3Dhttps-3A__www.eventbrite.com_e_team-2Dtrump-2Dvirginia-2Dsprint-2Dto-2Dthe-2Dfinish-2Dtickets-2D28366225143%26d%3DDQMFAg%26c%3Decx_Oy7LFev-5AZZypfA9UpMsuBfoOoTkgGzbwCI-s8%26r%3DG_FdiwLmlRqakhhsKYsiN1pz9uYNyRUklhAevojqZRw%26m%3D49p2rZI07Xz8gIFSipxLxUjAupSIAPod7NwTjQhPo9Y%26s%3D3umV7bmXgbfb3erHqT3U85uLSh5a0Y-_FdD-TJ_VjLE%26e%3D&e=8ff4c67fd343da79b63c0de3e94ed779&utm_source=donaldtrump&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=are_you_watchin&n=1)
Team Trump Virginia will be reaching out to voters across the Commonwealth this weekend by knocking on doors and making phone calls in search of supporters for our Trump/Pence ticket.

We need you to step up and be a part of the team.
[ Sign up here to get involved in the most important election of your lifetime.](https://donaldtrump.nationbuilder.com/r?u=https%3A%2F%2Furldefense.proofpoint.com%2Fv2%2Furl%3Fu%3Dhttps-3A__www.eventbrite.com_e_team-2Dtrump-2Dvirginia-2Dsprint-2Dto-2Dthe-2Dfinish-2Dtickets-2D28366225143%26d%3DDQMFAg%26c%3Decx_Oy7LFev-5AZZypfA9UpMsuBfoOoTkgGzbwCI-s8%26r%3DG_FdiwLmlRqakhhsKYsiN1pz9uYNyRUklhAevojqZRw%26m%3D49p2rZI07Xz8gIFSipxLxUjAupSIAPod7NwTjQhPo9Y%26s%3D3umV7bmXgbfb3erHqT3U85uLSh5a0Y-_FdD-TJ_VjLE%26e%3D&e=8ff4c67fd343da79b63c0de3e94ed779&utm_source=donaldtrump&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=are_you_watchin&n=2)

Friend --

Can you believe it, it's already October -- we've now got just five weeks left until Election Day.

name: Bullock HQ
subject: his "solution" hurts Montanans
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Steve Bullock - Democrat, P
body:
---
Friend,

In newly uncovered audio, Greg Gianforte previously argued that the _" best solution...would be to replace the current income and capital gains rate with a sales tax." _

Greg Gianforte might think that's the "best solution" for the wealthiest Montanans like himself. **In reality, it hurts working families** , raising the cost of everyday items like groceries, clothes and back to school supplies.

Mr. Gianforte may not know that Montanans have already rejected attempts to implement a statewide sales tax twice at the ballot box. But the fact is, **Gianforte's powerful allies are still pushing this regressive approach that benefits those at the top and costs everyone else more.**

Yesterday, Steve joined State Senator Dick Barrett to call for a constitutional amendment to settle this issue once and for all. **He needs your support.[Add your name to say no sales tax in Montana.](http://salsa4.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=i%2BmjkyIzfBpHBj7BNvGebib7gAd2XGLl) Not now. _Not ever._**

body:
I want you to accept my invitation so you can see this extraordinary event for yourself. |

Friend, attending a Presidential Debate is usually only reserved for the media, lobbyists, and special interests. But our campaign is different. It’s a movement fueled by hard-working everyday patriots, not lobbyists. So today I’d like to extend an invitation to you to see the Second Presidential Debate LIVE! Contribute $3 or more today and automatically enter for your chance to see the debate LIVE in St. Louis. Crooked Hillary has been in politics for nearly three decades and has done nothing. I’m not a politician; I’m a businessman. I don’t make excuses; I lead by example. And in this next debate, I will lead by example. I will show America that we will fight for the forgotten men and women that Hillary has done nothing for – the tens of millions of Americans Hillary calls deplorable. I want you to accept my invitation so you can see this extraordinary event for yourself. It’s up to citizens like you and me to fix the rigged system and take our country back. Join me today in the fight to Make America Great Again! With your donation of $3 or more you will not only be entering to win a trip to St. Louis for you and a friend but also fueling our movement. Thank you in advance. Sincerely, Donald J. Trump I WANT TO GO

NO PURCHASE, PAYMENT, OR CONTRIBUTION NECESSARY TO ENTER OR WIN. Contributing will not improve your chances of winning. Void where prohibited. You may enter by contributing to Trump Make America Great Again by clicking here. Alternatively, you may enter without contributing by clicking here. Entries must be received between September 30, 2016 at 12:00 a.m. Eastern Time and October 6, 2016 at 11:59 p.m. Eastern Time. Odds of winning depend on the number of eligible entries received. One (1) winner will receive the following Prize: Round trip airfare for the winner and one guest to St. Louis, Missouri, hotel accommodations for one (1) night for the winner and one guest, ground transportation at the discretion of Sponsor, and an invitation for the winner and a guest to attend the second debate in St. Louis, MO (approximate retail value $1,850). The Promotion is open only to U.S. citizens, or lawful permanent U.S. residents who are legal residents (green card holders) of the 50 United States, Puerto Rico, and the District of Columbia and are at least 18 years of age (or the age of majority under applicable law). Winner must be 18 or older (or of majority under applicable law) and meet other requirements as described in the Official Rules. Promotion subject to Official Rules and additional restrictions on eligibility may apply. Visit here for full details and Official Rules. body:
[](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fd959/2a380d31/168b5c80/fcc9ae/3784142668/VEsH/ "http://www.maggiehassan.com/")

Governor Hassan and Washington Republican Kelly Ayotte had their first televised debate earlier this week, and as much as Ayotte tried to run from her record, there's certainly one thing that's not up for dispute.
Ayotte is right in Trump's corner -- and she thinks he makes a great role model for our children!
[](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fd959/2a380d31/168b5c80/fcc9af/3784142668/VEsF/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoiaGFzc2FuX3Nlbl9lbWFpbCIsImUzc2djbVZtWTI5a1pTQjlmUT09IjoiZTIwMTYxMDA1XzEwMDNUcnVtcE1vZGVsLU5PX25oLW5kIiwiZTNzZ1RGQkJRVkYxWlhKNVUzUnlhVzVuSUgxOSI6IjMsMjUsNTAsMTAwLDI1MCw1MDAifQ==/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/hassan_sen_email?refcode=e20161005_1003TrumpModel-NO_nh-nd&amounts=3,25,50,100,250,500")
A man who **calls women "fat pigs"** is a role model?
A man who**attacks Gold Star families** is a role model?
A man who openly **mocks people with disabilities** is a role model?
Not in our book. **The only way to keep the Trump/Ayotte agenda out of Congress is if every single grassroots supporter steps up and gives $3 or more right now -- including you. [Recent polls show us trailing Trump-supporter Kelly Ayotte, so please give $3 -- every dollar you can -- directly to Maggie's campaign so that together, we can stop the Trump/Ayotte agenda.](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fd959/2a380d31/168b5c80/fcc9af/3784142668/VEsC/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoiaGFzc2FuX3Nlbl9lbWFpbCIsImUzc2djbVZtWTI5a1pTQjlmUT09IjoiZTIwMTYxMDA1XzEwMDNUcnVtcE1vZGVsLU5PX25oLW5kIiwiZTNzZ1RGQkJRVkYxWlhKNVUzUnlhVzVuSUgxOSI6IjMsMjUsNTAsMTAwLDI1MCw1MDAifQ==/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/hassan_sen_email?refcode=e20161005_1003TrumpModel-NO_nh-nd&amounts=3,25,50,100,250,500")**

name: Patrick Murphy
subject: Demand Rubio protect Social Security & Medicare
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Patrick Murphy | 4521 PGA Blvd #412, Palm Beach Gardens, FL 33418 | [http://murphyforflorida
body:
| |
---
| | [](https://secure.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae2d8f/738133e4/3138226f/7f857ff8/2287942099/VEsH/ "https://secure.murphyforflorida.com/e161005")
---
| Last week, a group of Florida retirees protested outside Marco Rubio's office. They're worried about politicians not protecting Social Security and they were asking Rubio to make a real commitment to protect it.

Florida seniors have every reason to be worried. **Rubio is on record saying that Social Security and Medicare have "weakened us as a people" and are "bankrupting this country."** He supports raising the retirement age, cutting Social Security benefits, and partially privatizing Medicare.

So for those seniors that showed up at Rubio's office -- and the millions of other Floridians who rely on Social Security -- you can see why they'd be concerned.

[_**Demand Marco Rubio make a commitment to protect Social Security and Medicare. Add your name to the petition >>**_](https://secure.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae2d8f/738133e4/3138226f/7f857ff8/2287942099/VEsE/ "https://secure.murphyforflorida.com/e161005")

**I 've taken a pledge to protect Social Security and Medicare because I know these aren't just "programs."** We're talking about people's lives. Without Medicare, millions of seniors wouldn't be able to afford healthcare. Without Social Security, millions of seniors would live in poverty.

Those Florida seniors were at Rubio's office to demand that he protect Social Security -- a system they paid into their entire working lives. **And today we can add our voices to their cause.**

I'm proud of my record of standing up for Florida seniors.

When the Social Security Administration announced that seniors wouldn't get a cost-of-living adjustment this year, I introduced a bill with Senator Elizabeth Warren to give seniors and veterans a one-time emergency increase in benefits.

Florida seniors need a champion in the Senate -- not someone who hates his job and puts special interests first. [_**Stand with Florida seniors and call on Rubio to protect Social Security and Medicare.**_](https://secure.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae2d8f/738133e4/3138226f/7f857ff8/2287942099/VEsF/ "https://secure.murphyforflorida.com/e161005")

Thanks for standing with us.

Patrick |

body:

**Watch Reaction from Last Night 's Debate **

We hope you had the chance to watch Jim debate Senate President Cole in front of a statewide audience last night. Jim was great!

He shared his vision for creating new jobs in West Virginia, improving our public schools, and upgrading our state's infrastructure. Jim made it clear that he'll use his experience as a businessman to grow jobs.

[VIDEO: Watch Jim discuss how education can be an economic driver for WV. ](https://act.myngp.com/el/7970133955158870016/-2156800309152315392?v=hpqtXx3bWEo&feature=youtu.be)

Jim didn't shy away from holding Senate President Bill Cole accountable for his failed leadership the last two years. Senator Cole couldn't defend the $600,000 he wasted not passing a budget on time, or explain West Virginia's credit downgrade under his watch.

[VIDEO: See the reaction to last night's debate.](https://act.myngp.com/el/7970133955158870016/-2156800309152315392?v=Ove0qL7ZDrw&feature=youtu.be)

Last night, Jim showed why he'll be a great governor for West Virginia. Even with all of the political talk from Senator Cole, it was clear to viewers that Cole is just another politician out for himself. In case you missed it: [watch our latest TV ad](https://act.myngp.com/el/7970133955158870016/-2156800309152315392?v=fsdlahkaDSM&feature=youtu.be) on Cole's self-serving agenda.

name: Kaila Thompson
subject: we won't let you down!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Van Hollen for US Senate
body:
Friend, I first met Chris discussing our different musical tastes, favorite movies and yes -- debating nuclear weapons policy and the nuclear freeze movement. Little did I know that 30 years later his passion to make our communities and our world a safer and better place would still be a defining theme of our lives together.

But I should have guessed, because Chris has always been a strong believer that government can be an important force for good. Sadly, we are living in a time when the radical ideology of groups like the Tea Party are undermining faith in our democracy. For the last 6 years Republican control of the Congress has enabled these extremists to control the agenda and block efforts to make progress.

That's why Washington Republicans and their big-money friends are determined not to lose their majority. They're trying to turn the tide of this election in races across the country--and Maryland won't be an exception.

Over the past few months, top Republicans like Scott Walker and Carly Fiorina have been helping fund our Republican opponent's agenda. They -- just like the NRA and a shady SuperPAC that has already started attacking Chris -- know that our opponent will stand with them if she's elected.

Chris won't.

Chris has spent his time in public service fighting to keep dark money out of politics and end gun violence, and advancing the issues that matter most to the people of Maryland. And when he's elected to the U.S. Senate, his opponent's big-money friends know that he'll keep fighting for our values and priorities.

Early voting begins in Maryland in less than 30 days, friend. Will you chip in $ or whatever you can right now to help keep us reach our September goal before Friday's FEC deadline?

If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:

Donate $5 to stand with Chris >>>

Donate $10 to stand with Chris >>>

Donate $25 to stand with Chris >>>

Donate $50 to stand with Chris >>>

Donate $100 to stand with Chris >>>

Donate $200 to stand with Chris >>>

Or donate another amount to stand with Chris >>>

Polls show that 19% of the electorate in Maryland is still undecided. We need to do better than that. With less than one month until early voting we must do everything we can to turn out as many voters as we possible and move our state and our country forward.

Thank you for being part of this,

Katherine

Herbert said he was going to propose an extra $400 million for Utah education next year. It didn't last long though: the VERY NEXT DAY he backtracked. "Available Jones" accidentally promised hundreds of millions of extra dollars for Utah school kids next year, but flip-flopped and took it back less than a day later. Education matters! We need a governor who will actually support education-not just talk big. Herbert isn't that champion, calling him an "inaction figure." Under Gov. Herbert, not only have we slid to DEAD LAST nationally in education funding, but quality has also suffered, with student performance and "educational outcomes" that are "mediocre." Davis added, "With Herbert as Utah's education champion, public education might as well have a 90-pound weakling." Enough is enough: Utah public education is in crisis and we need to get back on track! [**Donate $20 and help me make sure every Utah student gets a quality education!**](https://act.myngp.com/el/3119017626018450176/-1890719102356223232?am=20&recipientId=ENzs9AKZ1wqBssNbEIT6L&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com) Together with you,
Mike | Paid for by Mike Weinholtz for Governor
